initiatives.name: Floating & Rooftop Solar
initiatives.description: 7.3 MWp floating solar installed and 23 MWp rooftop solar under commission in Jajpur.
initiatives.outcome: Generated 6,155,850 kWh from onsite solar generation.

initiatives.name: Chrome Palletisation Plant
initiatives.description: Installed chrome palletization plant instead of traditional briquetting — lower specific energy consumption.

initiatives.name: Waste Heat Recovery Boiler (WHRB)
initiatives.description: Captures and utilizes waste heat during steelmaking to generate steam.

enrichment.managementCommentary: The Company is unwavering in its dedication to creating a sustainable future, driven by ESG responsibility. Utilizing scrap in an electric arc furnace — the most eco-friendly steelmaking method — ensures 100% recyclability. Management is evaluating realistic targets for reducing waste landfilled.

nonCompliance.description: No fines, penalties, or non-compliances reported for the year.

forwardLooking.description: Develop science-based targets for near-term and Net Zero GHG emissions through SBTi

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: The ABAC Policy ensures operations align with highest ethical standards to prevent fraud, bribery, and corruption.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: Driven by a 'No Harm' philosophy. Implemented ISO 45001:2018. Safety culture relies on Engineering Control, Education, Encouragement, and Enforcement.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Operations centred around Reduce, Reuse, Recycle, Recover, and Repurpose. ~72% of input material consists of recycled scrap and revert.

steelProduction.note: From plan config. Gemini derived ~1.76M t from BRSR — difference may reflect saleable vs crude denominator.
